phrases.intent_en: Ask what time the cathedral opens
phrases.text_local: À quelle heure ouvre la cathédrale ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel UR OOV-ruh lah kah-tay-DRAHL
phrases.cultural_note: Rouen Cathedral is free to enter and usually opens early in the morning.

phrases.intent_en: Ask to see the Tombs of the Dukes of Normandy
phrases.text_local: Où se trouvent les tombeaux des ducs de Normandie dans la cathédrale ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lay tohm-BOH day dook duh nor-mahn-DEE dahn lah kah-tay-DRAL
phrases.cultural_note: The cathedral houses the heart of Richard the Lionheart and the tomb of Rollo, the first Duke of Normandy. These are among the most significant medieval royal relics in France.

responses.english: In the chapel, to the right of the choir.
responses.phonetic: dahn lah shah-PEL ah DRWAHT doo KUR
responses.local: Dans la chapelle, à droite du chœur.

phrases.text_local: Est-ce qu'il est possible de visiter la crypte de la cathédrale ?
phrases.pronunciation: ess keel eh poh-SEEBL duh vee-zee-TAY lah KREEPT duh lah kah-tay-DRAL
phrases.cultural_note: The Romanesque crypt contains remains of the earlier cathedral and medieval episcopal palace. Access may require a guided tour — check at the entrance desk.

responses.english: You need to ask at reception.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if a guided tour is available
phrases.text_local: Est-ce qu'il y a une visite guidée disponible ?
phrases.pronunciation: ess keel ee ah oon vee-ZEET gee-DAY dees-poh-NEEBL
phrases.cultural_note: The Rouen tourism office organizes guided tours of the cathedral.

responses.english: Yes, ask at the tourism office.
responses.phonetic: wee rahn-sen-YAY-voo ah loh-FEESS duh too-REEZM
responses.local: Oui, renseignez-vous à l'office de tourisme.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what time the cathedral opens
phrases.text_local: À quelle heure ouvre la cathédrale le matin ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel UR OO-vruh lah kah-tay-DRAL luh mah-TAHN
phrases.cultural_note: The cathedral is free to enter. It typically opens at 8am on weekdays and has varied hours on Sundays due to mass schedules. The light inside changes dramatically throughout the day.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what time the evening light show starts
phrases.text_local: À quelle heure commence le spectacle de lumière ce soir ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel UR koh-MAHNSS luh spek-TAKL duh loo-MYAIR suh SWAHR
phrases.cultural_note: The cathedral facade light show runs during summer evenings and is free.

responses.phonetic: ah lah tohm-BAY duh lah NWEE vair vahn-DUH-ZUR
responses.local: À la tombée de la nuit, vers vingt-deux heures.
